title: Temperance needs some work - Review of Smith Tower Visitor ...
content: # Temperance needs some work - Smith Tower Visitor Experience. **#10** of 192 Sights & Landmarks in Seattle. *   Image 5 2 ### Seattle's Original Guided Harbor Cruise 4.7 (856) from $46. Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience. While the history of the Smith Tower is significant, unfortunately it help the issues plaguing Temperance. The lighting is harsh, it is cold and it lacks the intimacy you would expect for something billed as a special place. I hope that someone from the Smith tower contact me and I would be happy to discuss this with them as this is a missed opportunity. I am glad you enjoyed Temperance cafe and bar and I look forward to welcoming you back again soon. This is a fantastic building with a self guided tour and great views of the city from the bar and observation deck at the top. I am glad you enjoyed the Smith Tower Visitor Experience and I look forward to welcoming you back again soon.

title: One nice water feature surrounded by creepy. - Review of Freeway Park, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Freeway Park is a unique Urban Park in a great spot.from all points in the park you can hear the...read more. We stopped by this park on a nice bright sunny afternoon, and I can't describe how glad I am that we didn't go at night. There was this cool waterfall thing but we couldn't find a stroller friendly way to go look at it so we had to carry the stroller down a few flights of steps. There were some nice tables and chairs but there really wasn't much else to see and I had no desire to sick around. Date of experience: June 2013. *   Image 11 6 ### Mt Rainier National Park Small Group Tour from Seattle 4.5 (135) from $141. Being right in the middle of the city, Freeway Park can be a respite from the rush. It's a really cool spot in the middle of downtown (and RIGHT next to the freeway).

title: Wings Over Washington - Flying Ride // Review // Seattle, WA
content:
Wings Over Washington - Flying Ride // Review // Seattle, WA
Adventures Like This
343 subscribers
164 likes
47802 views
8 Feb 2017
Wings Over Washington is Seattle's newest tourist attraction. This is our review of the flying ride. It's said to be virtual reality but it is more like a 4D immersive theater. You are strapped into a row of seats which move to simulate a flying motion as you're watching a screen of iconic scenes of Washington state. It's a fun ride and it's family friendly! Our only complaint is that the ride is a bit short for the amount of money they charge. Excluding the introduction at the beginning the ride lasts about 10 minutes.
